# Phaseo

> Phaseo is an open-source AI gateway and model intelligence database for comparing AI models, providers, pricing, benchmarks, latency, throughput, and gateway support.

## Core product pages

- [Models](https://phaseo.ai/models): Browse AI models by provider, capability, modality, pricing, and gateway status.
- [API Providers](https://phaseo.ai/api-providers): Compare providers by model coverage, modality support, and usage signals.
- [Rankings](https://phaseo.ai/rankings): Usage, latency, throughput, and cost rankings across tracked models.
- [Pricing](https://phaseo.ai/pricing): Gateway pricing, credit fees, and cost guidance.
- [Docs](https://docs.phaseo.ai/v1): Developer documentation for the gateway and API.
- [Docs LLM index](https://phaseo.ai/llms.txt): Documentation index for AI tools and answer engines.

## Data and methodology

- [Pricing calculator](https://phaseo.ai/tools/pricing-calculator)
- [Model database](https://phaseo.ai/models)
- [Provider database](https://phaseo.ai/api-providers)
- [Benchmarks](https://phaseo.ai/benchmarks)
- [Methodology hub](https://phaseo.ai/methodology)
- [How Phaseo calculates model pricing](https://phaseo.ai/how-phaseo-calculates-model-pricing)
- [How Phaseo measures latency and throughput](https://phaseo.ai/how-phaseo-measures-latency-throughput)
- [How Phaseo normalises AI benchmarks](https://phaseo.ai/how-phaseo-normalises-ai-benchmarks)
- [How Phaseo tracks provider availability](https://phaseo.ai/how-phaseo-tracks-provider-availability)

## API

- [Quickstart](https://docs.phaseo.ai/v1/quickstart)
- [API reference](https://docs.phaseo.ai/v1/api-reference/introduction)
